      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      Events.AccessStartEventData AccessStartEventData
      Represents Access Start event data.
      Events.AccessStopEventData AccessStopEventData
      Represents Access stop event data.
      Events.AntennaEventData AntennaEventData
      Represents Antenna Event Data.
      Events.BufferFullWarningEventData BufferFullWarningEventData
      Represents Buffer Full warning event data.
      Events.DisconnectionEventData DisconnectionEventData
      Represents Reader Disconnect event data
      Events.GPIEventData GPIEventData
      Represents GPI Event Data (port and the current state).

      Represents Hand held Trigger Event Data (current state pressed/released)

      Represents Inventory start event data.

      Represents Inventory stop event data.
